Supplements Service in Newport Beach, CA

Resiliency Mind+Body Medicine MD

Your premier destination for cutting-edge supplements meticulously crafted to optimize mental health and neuron vitality. Founded by Dr. Stefani LaFrenierre, a double board-certified physician.

Shop Now View Supplements

Welcome to Resiliency Mind+Body Medicine

Physician-Developed Supplements

At Resiliency Mind+Body Medicine , we understand the intricate interplay between nutrition and neurological health. That's why each of our supplements is backed by scientific research and formulated with the highest quality ingredients to ensure maximum effectiveness.

Whether you're looking to sharpen your focus, boost your mood, or safeguard your brain against age-related decline, we have a solution for you. Our range of products caters to various aspects of mental health and neuron health, including memory enhancement, stress reduction, and mood stabilization.

  • Non-GMO, gluten-free & vegan formulas
  • Heavy metal tested for safety
  • Scientifically backed ingredients
  • Transparent ingredient & manufacturing info

100%

Evidence-Based

Focus & Memory

Focus Pro

Optimize Focus and Memory

Unlock your brain's full potential with Focus Pro, a physician-developed supplement meticulously crafted to support and enhance focus, concentration, and memory naturally. Our premium blend of scientifically-backed ingredients is designed to elevate cognitive performance, giving you the mental clarity you need to conquer every day.

Bacopa – Enhance learning abilities and memory retention

Ginkgo – Improve blood circulation to the brain and enhance memory and cognitive speed

Rhodiola – Sharpen memory and boost mood

NAC – Replenish antioxidants and nourish your neurons

B Vitamins – Improve energy, decrease inflammation, and boost neurotransmitter production

$45.00 Buy Now

Neuron Health

Neuro Harmony

Optimize and Regulate Neuron Functioning

Neuro Harmony promotes cognitive health and supports optimal neuron functioning in the brain. Our premium blend of scientifically-backed ingredients is designed to enhance neuron functioning and promote harmony at the cellular level.

Full of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory agents, this supplement aids in neuron balance and brain health and healing.

Inositol – Reduce anxiety, improve neurotransmitter functioning and cellular functioning

Omega-3 – Reduce inflammation, improve mood, improve brain healing

NAC – Replenish antioxidants and nourish your neurons

Glutathione – A powerful antioxidant that helps detoxify, boost immunity, and increase energy

Perfect for those recovering from traumatic brain injuries, mood episodes, PTSD, and for brain health support in psychosis or substance-induced mood disorders.

$45.00 Buy Now

Restful Sleep

Sleep Support

Natural and Effective Sleep Support

Experience the tranquility of restful nights with our physician-developed Sleep Boost. Crafted with expertise and a commitment to holistic well-being, this supplement is designed to support your journey to a peaceful and rejuvenating sleep, naturally.

Magnesium – Promotes melatonin regulation, relaxes muscles, reduces anxiety and stress, calms hyperactive nervous systems

L-Theanine – Promotes relaxation by increasing GABA, increasing restorative alpha brain wave activity

Chamomile – Full of antioxidants and powerful flavonoids, promotes sleep naturally with decreased anxiety, improved relaxation, anti-inflammation, and circadian rhythm regulation

Hyaluronic Acid – Hydrate the skin while you sleep giving you a healthy glow in the morning

$45.00 Buy Now

Most Popular

Mood Boost Pro

Improve Mood and Reduce Anxiety

Mood Boost Pro is our most popular formulation! It promotes healthy brain balance, alleviates symptoms of depression and anxiety and provides comprehensive support for mental well-being.

Magnesium – Promotes melatonin regulation, relaxes muscles, reduces anxiety and stress, calms hyperactive nervous systems

Saffron – This powerful spice increases the availability of dopamine and serotonin, reduces anxiety and inflammation, and improves sleep

Vitamin D3 + K2 – Improves mood, immune health, bone health, and reduces oxidative stress in the brain

B Vitamins – Improve energy, decrease inflammation, and boost neurotransmitter production

$45.00 Buy Now

Recommended by Our Physicians

Vitamins and Supplements

Below are a list of vitamins and supplements that we at Resiliency Mind+Body Medicine recommend to enhance overall health and well-being. These are available as single supplements or in combination with our unique physician-developed supplements available in office or online.

We also have included recommended IV Nutrition bags that we offer at Resiliency Mind+Body Medicine to boost vitamin levels and enhance overall health.

Vitamin D3 + K2

  • Enhances mood by keeping energy levels up and increasing blood flow
  • Regulates calcium and phosphorous for healthy bones and teeth
  • Modulates inflammation, helps heal damaged skin and wounds
  • Activates the innate and adaptive immune systems
  • Facilitates reparation of skin tissue
  • Inhibits stress-related protein activation
  • Suppresses production of pro-inflammatory proteins

Recommended IV

BOOST NRG RADIANCE M-UNE

To maximize absorption, the best organic, non-GMO supplements include vitamin K2.

Book Now

Magnesium Glycinate

  • Creates energy by activating ATP within cells, increases physical performance
  • Critical role in muscle contraction, prevents cramps
  • Anti-inflammatory properties, decreases pain levels
  • Provides antioxidant benefits
  • Increases sleep quality
  • Improves blood pressure

Recommended IV

BOOST NRG M-UNE

Glycinate is considered the best form of magnesium due to its incredible absorption rate. Preferred for sleep, cramps, blood pressure, and supporting mood.

Book Now

N-Acetylcysteine

  • Precursor of Glutathione
  • Promotes detox of liver and kidneys
  • Boosts brain health
  • Stabilizes blood sugar by decreasing inflammation in fat cells
  • Provides antioxidant benefits

Recommended IV

M-UNE NAD+
Book Now

Pyridoxine (B6)

  • Improves mood and decreases symptoms of depression through serotonin, dopamine, and GABA production
  • Decreases homocysteine levels associated with heart disease
  • Aids in hemoglobin production, helpful in certain types of anemia
  • Reduces free radical damage, helps with peripheral neuropathy and Tardive Dyskinesia
  • Enhances collagen production, restores skin hydration and texture

Recommended IV

BOOST NRG RADIANCE M-UNE
Book Now

Vitamin B12

  • Increases energy levels by helping conversion of food to glucose
  • Boosts athletic performance
  • Keeps nerves and red blood cells healthy
  • Prevents certain types of anemia
  • Supports bone health and reduces osteoporosis risk
  • Improves mood and reduces symptoms of depression
  • Benefits brain health by preventing neuron loss
  • Reduces nerve pain

Recommended IV

BOOST NRG M-UNE
Book Now

Glutamic Acid

  • Triggers the body's own production of Glutathione
  • Improves memory and focus
  • Boosts immune system
  • Detoxifies the body
  • Improves athletic performance
  • Benefits digestive system

Recommended IV

GLUT GLOW M-UNE
Book Now

Glutathione

  • Inhibits melanin production, lightening the skin
  • Prevents visible signs of aging of the skin
  • Strengthens the immune system
  • Detoxifies the liver
  • Removes free radicals from the body
  • Supports brain health

Recommended IV

The Resiliency Mind+Body Medicine Difference

Why Choose Our Supplements?

Non-GMO & Vegan

All-natural, plant-based formulas free from GMOs, gluten, and animal products.

Heavy Metal Tested

Rigorously tested for purity, potency, and safety with no heavy metals.

Physician-Developed

Created by Dr. Stefani LaFrenierre, a Double Board-Certified Physician.

Clinically Backed

Every ingredient backed by scientific research and clinical evidence.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

No, supplements don't require a prescription, but our providers recommend specific protocols based on your evaluation.
Supplements are typically self-pay. We offer competitive pricing on pharmaceutical-grade products.
Supplements complement but don't replace psychiatric medication. They work best as part of an integrative treatment plan.

Have more questions? Contact our clinical team.

Elevate your mental clarity, support cognitive function, and promote overall well-being with our physician-designed formulations. Shop now and embark on your journey to optimal brain health.
